text: Standing in this modern, angled hallway, I feel the crisp and orderly anticipation of a place where productivity and innovation dwell. The glass walls suggest transparency, while the signs of setup and technical equipment hint at ongoing preparation—perhaps for a gathering of minds thirsty for understanding. Moving into the vibrant exhibition space marked R+D, I am surrounded by bold colors and words of innovation. Here, I feel energized by the promise of discovery; the environment sparks curiosity and a sense of being part of something experimental and intellectually alive.
